view.title: View Stronghold {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to resend the welcome raven?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcome raven has been resent. Check your messenger raven perch.

reverseDns.title: Reverse DNS Settings
reverseDns.changeWarning: Changes to reverse DNS take up to an hour to show up.

ipmiLive.title: IPMI Stronghold Coordinates
ipmiLive.whatThisDoes: What does this arcane feature do?
ipmiLive.description: Grants live stronghold coordinates to the IPMI controller restricted to your coordinates and limited to 24 hours of use.

order.title: Commission Stronghold
order.hostnameHelp: Use the stronghold name to identify the stronghold. The territory does not need to be valid or registered. One period is required in the stronghold name. Other examples: database.local, web.server or your.name.
order.passwordRequirement: Note: Secret passphrase must contain at least 8 characters, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one number, a special character.
order.contactSales: Please contact our guild sales department.
order.agreeToTerms: Agree to the guild charter terms
order.autoRenewNotice: The subscription will automatically renew after every moon at {cost} until abandoned.
order.tosAcknowledgement: By checking this rune, you acknowledge that you are purchasing a subscription that automatically renews (As Per The Terms Outlined Above) and is billed to the coin purse you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the guild portal, select the active service and click the Abandon link or send a raven to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Guild Charter and Privacy Scroll. By checking the rune and clicking Place My Commission below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Guild Charter and Privacy Scroll.
order.iAgreeToTerms: I have read the terms above and I agree.
